lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: prabh meraa antarajaamee jaan |
lines.english: My God is the Inner-knower, the Searcher of Hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿਆਨੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: kaliaan mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Kalyaan, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਪੁਰਖ ਪੂਰਨ ਦੇਵ ॥੨॥੫॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak daas saranaagatee har purakh pooran dev |2|5|8|
lines.english: Slave Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of the Lord, the Perfect, Divine Primal Being. ||2||5||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮੇਸਰ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa pooran paramesar nihachal sach sabad neesaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Take pity on me, O Perfect Transcendent Lord; bless me with the True Eternal Insignia of the Shabad, the Word of God. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਆਨ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਤੇਰੀ ਆਸ ਤੇਰਾ ਮਨਿ ਤਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: har bin aan na koee samarath teree aas teraa man taan |
lines.english: O Lord, other than You, no one is all-powerful. You are the Hope and the Strength of my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਘਟਾ ਕੇ ਦਾਤੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਦੇਹਿ ਸੁ ਪਹਿਰਣੁ ਖਾਣੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sarab ghattaa ke daate suaamee dehi su pahiran khaan |1|
lines.english: You are the Giver to the hearts of all beings, O Lord and Master. I eat and wear whatever You give me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਤਿ ਮਤਿ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ਸੋਭਾ ਰੂਪੁ ਰੰਗੁ ਧਨੁ ਮਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: surat mat chaturaaee sobhaa roop rang dhan maan |
lines.english: Intuitive understanding, wisdom and cleverness, glory and beauty, pleasure, wealth and honor,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਸੂਖ ਆਨੰਦ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਪਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਲਿਆਣੁ ॥੨॥੬॥੯॥
lines.translit: sarab sookh aanand naanak jap raam naam kaliaan |2|6|9|
lines.english: all comforts, bliss, happiness and salvation, O Nanak, come by chanting the Lord's Name. ||2||6||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚਰਨ ਸਰਨ ਕਲਿਆਨ ਕਰਨ ॥
lines.translit: har charan saran kaliaan karan |
lines.english: The Sanctuary of the Lord's Feet bring salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਵਨੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: prabh naam patit paavano |1| rahaau |
lines.english: God's Name is the Purifier of sinners. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿਆਨੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: kaliaan mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Kalyaan, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਕਤਿ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਅਨਿਕ ਸੂਖ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਲਵੈ ਨ ਲਾਵਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: mukat jugat anik sookh har bhagat lavai na laavano |
lines.english: Liberation, the key to success, and all sorts of comforts do not equal loving devotional worship of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਜਪਿ ਨਿਸੰਗ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਨ ਖਾਵਨੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saadhasang jap nisang jamakaal tis na khaavano |1|
lines.english: Whoever chants and meditates in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, shall undoubtedly escape being consumed by the Messenger of Death. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦਰਸ ਲੁਬਧ ਦਾਸ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਜੋਨਿ ਨ ਧਾਵਨੋ ॥੨॥੭॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: prabh daras lubadh daas naanak bahurr jon na dhaavano |2|7|10|
lines.english: Slave Nanak longs for the Blessed Vision of God's Darshan; he shall never again wander in reincarnation. ||2||||7||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿਆਨ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: kaliaan mahalaa 4 asattapadeea |
lines.english: Kalyaan, Fourth Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਾ ਰਮ ਰਾਮੋ ਸੁਨਿ ਮਨੁ ਭੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: raamaa ram raamo sun man bheejai |
lines.english: Hearing the Name of the Lord, the All-pervading Lord, my mind is drenched with joy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਰਸੁ ਮੀਠਾ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸਹਜੇ ਪੀਜੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam amrit ras meetthaa guramat sahaje peejai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is Ambrosial Nectar, the most Sweet and Sublime Essence; through the Guru's Teachings, drink it in with intuitive ease. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਸਟ ਮਹਿ ਜਿਉ ਹੈ ਬੈਸੰਤਰੁ ਮਥਿ ਸੰਜਮਿ ਕਾਢਿ ਕਢੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: kaasatt meh jiau hai baisantar math sanjam kaadt kadteejai |
lines.english: The potential energy of fire is within the wood; it is released if you know how to rub it and generate friction.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਬਾਈ ਤਤੁ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਕਾਢਿ ਲਈਜੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raam naam hai jot sabaaee tat guramat kaadt leejai |1|
lines.english: In just the same way, the Lord's Name is the Light within all; the Essence is extracted by following the Guru's Teachings. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਉ ਦਰਵਾਜ ਨਵੇ ਦਰ ਫੀਕੇ ਰਸੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਦਸਵੇ ਚੁਈਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: nau daravaaj nave dar feeke ras amrit dasave chueejai |
lines.english: There are nine doors, but the taste of these nine doors is bland and insipid. The Essence of Ambrosial Nectar trickles down through the Tenth Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਜੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kripaa kripaa kirapaa kar piaare gurasabadee har ras peejai |2|
lines.english: Please take pity on me - be kind and compassionate, O my Beloved, that I may drink in the Sublime Essence of the Lord, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨ ਲਾਲ ਅਮੋਲ ਅਮੋਲਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਲੀਜੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ratan laal amol amolak satigur sevaa leejai |3|
lines.english: The most precious and priceless gems and jewels are obtained by serving the True Guru. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਨਗਰੁ ਨਗਰੁ ਹੈ ਨੀਕੋ ਵਿਚਿ ਸਉਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa nagar nagar hai neeko vich saudaa har ras keejai |
lines.english: The body-village is the most sublime and exalted village, in which the merchandise of the Lord's Sublime Essence is traded.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗਮੁ ਹੈ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਭਰਿ ਸਾਗਰ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur agam agam hai tthaakur bhar saagar bhagat kareejai |
lines.english: The True Guru is Inaccessible; Inaccessible is our Lord and Master. He is the overflowing Ocean of bliss - worship Him with loving devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਦੀਨ ਹਮ ਸਾਰਿੰਗ ਇਕ ਬੂੰਦ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਦੀਜੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: kripaa kripaa kar deen ham saaring ik boond naam mukh deejai |4|
lines.english: Please take pity on me, and be Merciful to this meek song-bird; please pour a drop of Your Name into my mouth. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਨੁ ਲਾਲੁ ਲਾਲੁ ਹੈ ਰੰਗਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਰੰਗਨ ਕਉ ਗੁਰ ਦੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: laalan laal laal hai rangan man rangan kau gur deejai |
lines.english: O Beloved Lord, please color my mind with the Deep Crimson Color of Your Love; I have surrendered my mind to the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਰਸ ਰਸਿਕ ਗਟਕ ਨਿਤ ਪੀਜੈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: raam raam raam rang raate ras rasik gattak nit peejai |5|
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Love of the Lord, Raam, Raam, Raam, continually drink in this essence in big gulps, savoring its sweet taste. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸੁਧਾ ਸਪਤ ਦੀਪ ਹੈ ਸਾਗਰ ਕਢਿ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਕਾਢਿ ਧਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: basudhaa sapat deep hai saagar kadt kanchan kaadt dhareejai |
lines.english: If all the gold of the seven continents and the oceans was taken out and placed before them,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਕੇ ਜਨ ਇਨਹੁ ਨ ਬਾਛਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਾਗਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਦੀਜੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: mere tthaakur ke jan inahu na baachheh har maageh har ras deejai |6|
lines.english: the humble servants of my Lord and Master would not even want it. They beg for the Lord to bless them with the Lord's Sublime Essence. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਨਰ ਪ੍ਰਾਨੀ ਸਦ ਭੂਖੇ ਨਿਤ ਭੂਖਨ ਭੂਖ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: saakat nar praanee sad bhookhe nit bhookhan bhookh kareejai |
lines.english: The faithless cynics and mortal beings remain hungry forever; they continually cry out in hunger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਵਤੁ ਧਾਇ ਧਾਵਹਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਲਖ ਕੋਸਨ ਕਉ ਬਿਥਿ ਦੀਜੈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: dhaavat dhaae dhaaveh preet maaeaa lakh kosan kau bith deejai |7|
lines.english: They hurry and run, and wander all around, caught in the love of Maya; they cover hundreds of thousands of miles in their wanderings. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਊਤਮ ਕਿਆ ਉਪਮਾ ਤਿਨੑ ਦੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: har har har har har jan aootam kiaa upamaa tina deejai |
lines.english: The humble servants of the Lord, Har, Har, Har, Har, Har, are sublime and exalted. What praise can we bestow upon them?
